data.title: Hong Kong-listed company Zhiyun International has completed Bitcoin account opening and purchased over 1 BTC
data.description: According to an announcement from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, Zhiyun International, a Hong Kong-listed company, disclosed that its wholly-owned subsidiary Zhiyun Kuangshi Co., Ltd. has completed the opening of a Bitcoin account at a regulated virtual asset trading platform service provider in Hong Kong, and purchased more than one Bitcoin through the group's internal resources, with an average purchase price of approximately US$118,000 (equivalent to approximately HK$918,000).

data.title: Zhiyun International Purchases Bitcoin in Hong Kong
data.description:
Zhiyun International's subsidiary acquires over one Bitcoin, marking institutional crypto adoption in Hong Kong.
source: https://coincu.com/364907-zhiyun-international-bitcoin-purchase

data.title: The whales who bought the bottom of ETH at $1582 began to take profits and deposited 1000 ETH to CEX
data.description: On-chain analyst Aunt Ai (@ai_9684 xtpa) monitored that a whale that had made a profit of $12.78 million through ETH transferred 1,000 ETH (US$4.01 million) to the trading platform 5 hours ago, five months after establishing an ETH position at US$1,582. If sold, it would have made a profit of US$2.426 million, and the remaining 5,000 ETH would still have a floating profit of US$12.16 million.

data.title: Indian Authorities Charge Raj Kundra in Bitcoin Case
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitinning founder Kashif Raza announced on X that the Indian Enforcement Directorate (ED) has filed charges against Raj Kundra. Kundra is accused of possessing 285 bitcoins, valued at approximately 1.5 billion rupees (around 150 crore). This case is linked to the late Amit Bhardwaj's cryptocurrency Ponzi scheme, which involved 660.6 billion rupees.

data.title: StandX's total locked value has exceeded US$100 million
data.description: Decentralized contract exchange StandX announced in a post on X that the protocol’s total locked value (TVL) has exceeded $100 million, a four-fold increase in the past week.

data.title: Market maker team Auros Global deposited 30 million USDC to Hyperliquid and then bought a large amount of XPL
data.description: On-chain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684 xtpa) has detected an address that deposited 30 million USDC into Hyperliquid and purchased a large amount of XPL, suspected to belong to the quantitative trading and market making team Auros Global, previously recognized by Bybit as a high-quality market maker and included in its recommended list. The address has already purchased approximately $17.25 million worth of XPL and is still purchasing, suggesting a plan to use up all 30 million USDC.

data.title: The mNAV of Ethereum treasury companies SharpLink, ETHZilla, and The Ether Machine all fell below 1
data.description: Data from Strategic ETH Reserve shows that as ETH prices decline, the mNAV indicators of three Ethereum treasury companies, SharpLink, The Ether Machine, and ETHZilla, have all fallen below 1, currently reaching 0.99, 0.07, and 0.88, respectively. These companies hold 838,730, 495,360, and 102,240 ETH, respectively. mNAV, the ratio of market capitalization to net asset value, is a key metric for measuring treasury company valuations. If mNAV is greater than 1, the company can issue additional shares at a premium and use the proceeds to purchase ETH, thereby increasing its per-share ETH holdings and increasing its book value. If mNAV converges to 1 or below, the price of ETH itself will decline, and the secondary market will weaken, shifting the flywheel mechanism from "enhancement" to "dilution," creating a negative feedback loop.

data.title: Bitcoin’s ‘biggest bull catalyst’ may be the next Fed chair pick: Novogratz
data.description:
Mike Novogratz said “of course” Bitcoin could reach $200,000 if the Federal Reserve adopts a highly dovish stance following a leadership change.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-s-biggest-bull-catalyst-may-be-the-next-fed-chair-pick-novogratz?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: 70% Decline In Corporate Crypto Treasury Buying: What’s Going On?
data.description:
A recent report from Bloomberg has unveiled a striking decline in corporate investment in crypto treasuries, highlighting a significant shift in this new trend that has considerably taken the market by storm throughout the year. Purchases by publicly traded digital-asset treasuries have plummeted dramatically, from 64,000 Bitcoin (BTC) in July to just 12,600 in August, with September’s figures currently at around 15,500. This drop represents a major 76% decrease from the fervor of early summer. Crypto Treasury Firms Valuation Sinks The broader cryptocurrency market has faced additional challenges, with Bitcoin experiencing nearly a 6% decline over the past week, exacerbated by a broader selloff characterized by sudden liquidations
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/70-decline-in-corporate-crypto-treasury-buying-whats-going-on/

data.title: Maji Big Brother closed his XPL position for a profit of $152,000 and opened a new BTC long position
data.description: On-chain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684xtpa) reported that Majidage closed his long XPL position three hours ago, pocketing a $152,000 profit. He subsequently opened a new $1.64 million long position in BTC with 40x leverage, holding 15 BTC at an opening price of $109,277.7.

data.title: Syz Capital partner Richard Byworth pulled money from MSTR and ETFs and invested in Metaplanet
data.description: Richard Byworth, a partner at Swiss hedge fund Syz Capital, is withdrawing funds from Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) and some Bitcoin ETF investments and starting to invest in Japanese Bitcoin treasury company Metaplanet. He expects the company's market performance to outperform Bitcoin's recent market trends by more than 50%. (BitcoinTreasuries)

data.title: Eric Trump once again calls for buying at the bottom
data.description: Trump's second son, Eric Trump, once again posted on social media to remind people to buy at the bottom: "Buy on dips!" Eric Trump has previously repeatedly reminded people to buy at the bottom when the market falls. On February 4 this year, he posted that now is the best time to increase holdings of ETH. Subsequently, ETH fell 40% in two months.

data.title: Abstract core contributors: Starting next week, points will be distributed to LPs on Abstract
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reports that Abstract core contributor cygaar has published a post on the X platform announcing that starting next week, users (LPs) providing liquidity on Abstract will be given points (XP). Eligible currency pairs will be major currencies (ETH, PENGU, USDC, USDT, etc.), and more tokens will be added after observing liquidity development.

data.title: Kalshi contract trading open interest exceeds $200 million, hitting a record high
data.description: DefiLlama data shows that open interest on the prediction market platform Kalshi surpassed $200 million in late September, reaching a new all-time high. This figure was less than $50 million in April of this year, representing an increase of over 300% over the past six months. Trading volume also showed an upward trend during the same period, with multiple days in September trading between $50 million and $100 million.

data.title: MIRA contract holdings exceed US$50 million
data.description: Coinglass data shows that MIRA's open interest has increased to 34.1869 million tokens, with a market value exceeding $50 million. Currently trading at $51.2456 million, it has increased by 5.95% over the past four hours. Binance's MIRA contract open interest reached 14.3099 million tokens, ranking first, with a value of $21.4406 million. Bybit's contract open interest reached 5.1975 million tokens, with a value of $7.8113 million. Market data shows that MIRA briefly reached 2.3 USDT after Binance's opening, and is currently trading at 1.4929 USDT.

data.title: OpenAI CEO Predicts Arrival of Super AI by 2030
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has projected that Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), described as 'super AI' and significantly smarter than humans, will emerge before 2030. Altman encourages a positive outlook on AI, noting that many jobs from 30 years ago have already disappeared without AI's influence. He asserts that AI will eventually take over 30-40% of jobs in the human economic and social sectors.

data.title: Tether Mints Additional USDT on Ethereum Network
data.description: According to PANews, Lookonchain monitoring has revealed that Tether has minted an additional 1 billion USDT on the Ethereum network. Over the past week, both Tether and Circle have collectively minted stablecoins valued at $6 billion.
